---
title: "Discursive Indexing of Latent Distributions"
subtitle: "Cultural Compression as Model Control"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 350px
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      x: 0.75in
      y: 0.75in
format-links: false
other-links:
  - text: PDF
    href: index.pdf
    icon: file-pdf
cache: false
freeze: false
---

{{< include _part1-phenomenon.qmd >}}

{{< include _part2-mechanism.qmd >}}

{{< include _part3-discourse.qmd >}}

{{< include _part4-demonstration.qmd >}}

{{< include _part5-implications.qmd >}}

{{< include _part6-context.qmd >}}
